ValidationRule.description: This is required for Moving opp to stage 2.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) , DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , fxRecordTypeName__c ="PKI SPI Sales Process" , fxStageNumber__c >=2 , OR( FIND("Why:", Description)-FIND("What:", Description)<=8 , LEN(Description)-FIND("Why:", Description)<=4 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_077: The description field needs to have ( What: & Why: ) fully completed.
